message:
feat: add Cursor session provider and register in discovery

Implements a new Cursor IDE session provider (src/providers/cursor.rs) that reads
and parses Cursor's session storage format. This enables cross_agent_sessions_resumer
to discover and resume sessions from Cursor alongside existing Claude Code and
Codex providers.

- cursor.rs: Full provider implementation (~1440 lines) with session file discovery,
  parsing of Cursor's storage format, message extraction, and metadata handling
- providers/mod.rs: Register Cursor provider in the provider registry
- discovery.rs: Add Cursor paths to session discovery scan list

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
